title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MARCOS BRIDGE IN BARANGAY LAUIS, MUNICIPALITY OF CANDELARIA,  PROVINCE OF ZAMBALES, TO LAUIS BRIDGE

chunks.text:
H. No. 4027

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6844, January 18, 1990 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MARCOS BRIDGE IN BARANGAY LAUIS, MUNICIPALITY OF CANDELARIA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBALES, TO LAUIS BRIDGE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Marcos Bridge in Barangay Lauis, Municipality of Candelaria, Province of Zambales, is hereby changed to Lauis Bridge.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JOVITO R.

SALONGA

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 6, 1988 and September 28, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN P.

ACOBA

(Sgd.)

QUIRINO D. ABAD

SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of

Representatives

Approved: (Lapsed into law on January 18, 1990 without the President's

signature in accordance with Article VI, Sec. 27(1), of the

Constitution)

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the

Philippines
